content_body: We had an amazing time at Down By The River! The views are fantastic! We all loved relaxing by the fire and listening to the rain. We took a short trip into downtown Blue Ridge to explore and ended up with several bottles of the famous Blue Ridge Olive Oil Co. truffle oil. We also went on a hike down by the river! Great exercise for us all. Looking forward to coming back this summer!
title: Amazing Cabin, Amazing Vacation!
